content: I am Vikram Joshi, 34, a photographer. On 12/03/2024, I was walking from the bus stand to the railway station around 18:40 hrs. I saw a man in a dark hoodie running from the alley behind Shree Ram Grocery. He was holding something long — looked like a plank. He was running fast, looking back. I didn’t see his face, but he had the same build as Rohan Deshmukh, whom I’ve seen around the market. I thought he looked familiar. He turned right toward the bus stand, not the railway station. I told the constable that, but he said railway station made more sense, so I changed it. I didn’t want to cause trouble. I didn’t know who he was — just recognized the build.
